description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a minimalist facade, featuring large rectangular windows on the upper floor and a black awning above the ground floor. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, and the building sits on a paved sidewalk with two tall, narrow conifer trees flanking the entrance. The house is situated along a street with four parked cars and a yellow road marking, suggesting an urban or suburban neighborhood. The ground floor appears to have commercial or communal space, while the upper floor is divided into several rooms, visible from the open roof. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist gray facade, set along a street with parked cars and flanked by tall conifer trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, black awning, two conifer trees, and four parked cars along the street.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, the paved sidewalk, and the arrangement of trees and cars along the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall of the house and the internal room divisions visible from above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the sidewalk, trees, and the arrangement of cars, with a clear look at the house's side wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a black awning, flanked by two tall conifer trees, and a paved sidewalk; no visible steps or porch.
